title: Phase 1: Config module and YAML file
description: Create src/codex_orchestrator/config.py with three frozen dataclasses (SchedulerConfig, BackendConfig, OrchestratorConfig), load_config() and default_config() public functions. Create .orchestrator/config.yaml with default values matching all current hardcoded constants. Add pyyaml>=6,<7 dependency to pyproject.toml.
acceptance_criteria: config.py defines SchedulerConfig, BackendConfig, and OrchestratorConfig as frozen dataclasses
OrchestratorConfig.backend(name) raises KeyError listing valid backends if not found
OrchestratorConfig.allowed_tools_for(backend, agent_type) returns deduplicated union of default + agent-specific tools
load_config(root) falls back to default_config() when file does not exist
default_config() returns values identical to current hardcoded constants
.orchestrator/config.yaml contains all sections from spec (common, codex, claude)
